summary: Full backend + frontend regression for the Bahasa Indonesia translation AND the new 'Impor dari URL' feature. Backend pytest suite (6/6 passing): /api/recipes/import happy-path against fixture http.server returns title 'Nasi Goreng Spesial', 4 ingredients, 4 instructions, cookTime=30, servings=4 from JSON-LD; invalid URL returns 400 'URL harus diawali http:// atau https://'; valid URL with no recipe returns 422 'Tidak menemukan resep di halaman ini.'; blank and missing-field URLs validated; root /api/ works. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844 via web preview): after clearing recipes.v1 + reload, all UI strings rendered in Bahasa Indonesia — header 'DAPUR HARI INI' / 'Buku Resep', search placeholder 'Cari judul atau bahan', filter chips Semua/Sarapan/Makan Siang/Makan Malam/Pencuci Mulut/Camilan, featured eyebrow 'PILIHAN · MAKAN MALAM', meta 'X mnt' & 'X porsi'. Seed recipes v2 are Indonesian (Pancake Buttermilk, Salad Ayam Panggang, Spaghetti Pomodoro Klasik, Kue Lapis Cokelat Pekat, Trail Mix Almond Madu). Detail screen labels MEMASAK/PORSI/TINGKAT + 'Bahan-bahan' / 'Cara membuat'. Edit form: header 'Resep baru', labels JUDUL/KATEGORI/WAKTU MASAK (MNT)/PORSI/TINGKAT KESULITAN, save 'Simpan resep'. Import flow end-to-end: open-import-btn opens import-panel; submitting empty/invalid URL shows import-error in Indonesian ('Masukkan URL terlebih dahulu.' / 'URL harus diawali http:// atau https://'); submitting fixture URL http://127.0.0.1:8765/recipe auto-populates title, image, 4 ingredients, 4 instructions, cookTime=30, servings=4, shows import-banner 'Resep berhasil diimpor. Periksa kembali sebelum menyimpan.'; user can edit title and Save (testID save-recipe-btn) → recipe appears on home grouped under Makan Malam. NOTE: An initial test run before restarting expo returned a stale bundle still showing English header 'TODAY'S KITCHEN / Recipe Vault' — sudo supervisorctl restart expo cleared it. Metro is running in CI mode (no watch); main agent should restart expo after any UI string change.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings persist: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Originating from favFab in /app/frontend/app/recipe/[id].tsx:258-262. Cosmetic only — RN web only, native unaffected.

action_items: (Carryover from iteration 1, still unresolved) In /app/frontend/app/recipe/[id].tsx onDelete, fall back to router.replace('/') when !router.canGoBack() so direct deep-link delete returns user to home.
(Optional cosmetic) Replace shadow* style props on favFab with cross-platform boxShadow to silence RN web deprecation warning.
Heads-up: Metro is started in CI mode (no watch). After changing UI strings, main agent must `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` to rebundle, otherwise a stale bundle (English copy) is served.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/recipes/import correctly walks JSON-LD lists / @graph and falls back to OG title/image; Indonesian detail strings on both 400 and 422 paths. ISO 8601 duration parser handles PT30M and PT1H30M.

Frontend edit.tsx import handler properly disables submit while pending, surfaces backend's Indonesian error via `data.detail`, clears state on retry, and only renders the import block when !editing (correct — import should not appear on edit-existing).
Storage key bumped to recipes.v2 — existing v1 data is ignored on first load (verified by clearing localStorage and seeing v2 Indonesian seeds appear).
All new testIDs requested (open-import-btn, import-panel, import-url-input, import-submit-btn, import-error, import-banner, save-recipe-btn) are present and stable.
seed_data_creation: Created one test recipe 'Nasi Goreng Test' via the import-then-edit-then-save happy path; remains in localStorage (recipes.v2). Backend has no DB writes for this feature.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully translated to Bahasa Indonesia and storage key is recipes.v2. Public URL: https://meal-keeper-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend import endpoint POST /api/recipes/import accepts {url} and returns {title,image,ingredients[],instructions[],cookTime,servings}. For happy-path tests DO NOT use real recipe sites (allrecipes/simplyrecipes return 402 to bots); spin up a tiny Python http.server like /tmp/fixture_server.py serving a JSON-LD Recipe and POST that URL. pytest harness in /app/backend/tests/conftest.py spawns this fixture on 127.0.0.1:8765 automatically. Metro runs in CI mode — restart expo via supervisorctl after any UI string change. Known carryover from iter 1: deep-link delete still uses router.back() without canGoBack fallback.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no new regressions found. Initial stale-bundle observation (English header) was resolved by `sudo supervisorctl restart expo`, which forced Metro to rebundle from disk. Root cause: Metro's CI mode (EXPO CI=true) disables file-watch reloads, so edits to index.tsx/edit.tsx/[id].tsx after the process started were not picked up until restart.
